titleStmt.title: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in China ( Stuart )

div.head: The Secretary of State to the Ambassador in China ( Stuart )
div.p: 128. Reurtel 206, Jan. 25. Dept has no objection transfer evacuées Manila to Baguio if Emb Manila agreeable and accommodations available.The Chargé in the Philippines in telegram No. 251, January 28, reported accommodations unavailable at Baguio (125.0093/1–2849). Dept pursuing matter with Army.

Dept cannot agree return dependents China presently and does not consider Macao suitable place final refuge. If conditions unsuitable return dependents China before closing Manila staging area Dept will order movement dependents US unless other suitable refuge justified and previously approved by Dept.
Repeated Manila.Repeated to Manila as No. 107.
